title: Flutter Mastery Test
description: Comprehensive test covering Flutter fundamentals and advanced concepts

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the 'build' method in Flutter?
options: To describe the part of the user interface
questions.explanation: The build method describes the part of the user interface represented by this widget. It's called whenever the widget needs to be rebuilt.
hints: Think about how Flutter creates UI

questions.question: Which widget is used to create a scrollable list that only builds visible items?
questions.explanation: ListView creates a scrollable list that lazily builds its children. Only the visible items are built, making it efficient for long lists.
hints: It's the most common scrolling widget

questions.question: What does 'hot reload' do in Flutter development?
options: Injects updated code without losing state
questions.explanation: Hot reload injects updated source code files into the running Dart VM. It preserves the app's state, allowing for rapid iteration.

questions.question: Which state management approach uses ChangeNotifier?
questions.explanation: Provider often works with ChangeNotifier for simple state management. It's part of Flutter's recommended state management approaches.
hints: It's recommended by the Flutter team

questions.question: What is the purpose of 'keys' in Flutter widgets?
options: To preserve state when widgets move around the tree
questions.explanation: Keys are used to preserve state when widgets move around the widget tree. They help Flutter differentiate between widgets.
